overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 142 条，入选 2 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 142 previously displayed items excluded, and 2 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: [AINews] OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol / Terra / Luna — restricted to trusted partners
items.summary_zh: 重点：Oddly tiered releases to both OAI and ANT on the same day.
items.summary_en: Focus: Oddly tiered releases to both OAI and ANT on the same day.
